description: Conduct a manual data collection protocol using OpenICE. Create a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter and perform a 2-minute sampling protocol, recording at least 5 samples of live Heart Rate and SpO2 data spaced approximately 30 seconds apart. Save the collected data to '/home/ga/Desktop/monitor_sample.csv' with the header 'Time,HeartRate,SpO2'. Analyze the data and write a summary report to '/home/ga/Desktop/sample_analysis.txt' containing the Mean Heart Rate, SpO2 Range (min-max), and a stability assessment.
